summary: Fair audience (AUD) recording with noticeable hiss and crowd bleed, yet the show dazzles on a soaring Morning Dew, fiery Loser and an epic Althea jam.
review: The tape is an audience‑sourced capture that suffers from hiss, occasional muffling and a noisy balcony ambience, but most listeners agree the performance shines. Highlights include a blistering Morning Dew, a storytelling Terrapin/Loser run and a second‑set Althea that builds into one of the best jams of the night.

ai_rating.rationale: Most reviewers praise the musical performance (especially Morning Dew, Loser, Althea) while consistently noting poor to fair AUD recording quality; weighted average of show (70%) and recording (30%) yields a solid good‑to‑great rating.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Heavy hiss and crowd noise, especially in the first set; many note the need for EQ to make it listenable. Some describe occasional clarity on Morning Dew, but overall the tape is described as 'piss poor' or 'washed out'.

show_quality.setlist_flow: First set suffers from poor sound but is still fun; second set improves dramatically, delivering an epic Althea jam and high energy throughout.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Praised for blistering leads on Loser, Deal and Morning Dew, as well as storytelling guitar work during Terrapin.
band_member_comments.Phil: A few reviewers note Phil’s bass ‘dropping the bomb’ and delivering solid low‑end foundation.
